lsp.justification: The answer matches the GT’s substantive inventory: per-worker bio_jobs and bio_jobs_counter under bio_mutex/bio_newjob_cond, bio_comp_list under the separate bio_mutex_comp, job_comp_pipe with no mutex, the three redisAtomic AOF fields, and immutable server.bio_cpulist. It also correctly excludes bio_threads and the constant mapping/title arrays; the only minor omission is not listing bio_mutex/bio_newjob_cond as separate shared globals, but it identifies them correctly as the protecting primitives.
